text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Somebody's gotten inside my head! Betcha this is
the work of a ninja!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It feels all prickly—and sometimes it throbs like
ya wouldn't believe! That ninja's throwin' daggers
right on beat!
choice_data_list: Do you mean you have a headache?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothin'! Pain, pain, go away! Don't come
back another day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle is having a hard time dealing with
her headache...
